creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi James,

thanks for submitting this update however I do not manage to fetch the archive from your site (probably due to permission issues):

===>   drood-3.25 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> drood-3.25.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.mammothcheese.ca/drood-3.25.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.mammothcheese.ca/drood-3.25.tar.gz: Forbidden

Could you have a look at it please?

Thanks,
Frederic
